paper.title: Providing ChatGPT to the Entire U.S. Federal Workforce
paper.abstract: Today, OpenAI for Government is announcing a new partnership with the U.S. General Services Administration (GSA) to launch a transformative initiative. For the next year, ChatGPT Enterprise will be available to the entire federal executive branch workforce at essentially no cost.

review_questions: Can you find specific memory numbers in the paper?
